summary: CV Family & Schooling census — enrichment (~20-field schema, Sonnet workers, 1 site visit + 1 search)
logs: Batch 3: enriching 40 family/schooling entities (Sonnet 4.6, 1 site visit + 1 search)...

enrichment.name: FCA SC Coachella Valley
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Club runs year-round competitive play across Southern California but surfaces primarily on its own subdomain pages rather than third-party youth-sports directories; low aggregator coverage understates its community footprint.
enrichment._src_name: FCA SC Coachella Valley (Fellowship of Christian Athletes Soccer)

enrichment.enrollment_or_capacity_hint: limited spaces; registration open for 2026 season

enrichment.name: Six Blades Jiu-Jitsu La Quinta
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Site domain now redirects to The Flow Institute (TFI) chain — brand identity is diffuse online; Yelp and Chamber listings still carry the Six Blades name but the owned web presence is effectively gone.

enrichment.name: Dance Dimensions
enrichment.subcategory: arts, music & performing-arts education for youth
enrichment.full_address: 44155 Jefferson St Suite 103, La Quinta, CA 92253
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Studio has 20+ years of operation and strong community reviews but the La Quinta location (opened 2026) surfaces only on its own site and Yelp aggregators — no independent local press or directory coverage yet.

enrichment.name: Old Town Artisan Studios
enrichment.subcategory: arts, music & performing-arts education for youth
enrichment.ages_grades_served: all ages; youth camps ages 7–15; children, adults, seniors
special_programs_if_stated: outreach/mobile mission for special needs and underserved youth
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Established 501(c)(3) with a 3-acre campus, outreach programs, and strong community presence since 2009, but own website returns 403 to bots — all agent-accessible info flows through aggregators only.

enrichment.name: Art Major Studios
enrichment.subcategory: arts, music & performing-arts education for youth
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Studio has a multi-state presence (CA, CO, WA) and community-focused inclusive programming, but surfaces primarily via Yelp and a regional tourism listing rather than authoritative education directories.

enrichment.name: Tools For Tomorrow
enrichment.subcategory: arts, music & performing-arts education for youth
enrichment.full_address: 42600 Cook Street, Suite 202, Palm Desert, CA 92211
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Organization has operated since 1998 across 10+ Coachella Valley cities with foundation grant coverage, but surfaces weakly in search — dominated by La Quinta Art Celebration and unrelated entities.

enrichment.name: La Quinta Music Lessons
enrichment.subcategory: arts, music & performing-arts education for youth
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Own site and Yelp/Facebook listings surface but aggregators dominate; no Google Business or directory presence beyond third-party listings.

enrichment.name: Family YMCA of the Desert School Age Childcare
enrichment.full_address: 50-800 Desert Club Dr, La Quinta, CA 92253
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: YMCA is a well-established community institution but its own site is bot-blocked (403); aggregators (Yelp, Winnie, findhelp.org, childcarecenter.us) dominate search results over the org's own pages.

special_programs_if_stated: Tasty Travels – Around the World camp
Junior Pro Culinary – Way Cool Cooking School
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Site returned HTTP 526 (SSL failure) — primary web presence is broken, leaving the entity reliant on Yelp and third-party articles for discovery despite being cited as the first and only cooking school in Greater Palm Springs.

enrichment.name: First School of the Desert – La Quinta
enrichment._src_name: First School of the Desert – La Quinta

enrichment.name: Tadpoles to Butterflies Preschool and Childcare

enrichment.name: Desert YMCA / La Quinta Child Development Center
enrichment.full_address: 49-955 Moon River Drive, La Quinta, CA 92253
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Own ECE subdomain surfaces in top results alongside Chamber of Commerce coverage and multiple aggregators, but the primary ymcaofthedesert.org domain returns 403 to bots, hiding program detail from crawlers.
enrichment._src_name: Desert YMCA / La Quinta Child Development Center

enrichment.name: La Quinta Christian Fellowship School
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: School has a CDE listing, GreatSchools/US News/Niche profiles, and a functioning admissions portal, but the church website (lqcfchurch.org) shows no school-specific content — all visibility comes from aggregators, not the school's own web presence.

enrichment.name: Desert Christian Private School
enrichment.faith_affiliation_if_stated: Christian (per name; not confirmed on own site)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: No own-domain website found; school surfaces only on third-party aggregators (GreatSchools, Niche, PrivateSchoolReview) with an unclaimed, minimal profile — near-zero direct web presence for a K-12 school.

enrichment.name: VIVE Enrichment Academy
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Website is unreachable (ECONNREFUSED); only a Yelp aggregator listing surfaces in search — no own-site or authoritative-source presence detected.

enrichment.name: First Tee – Coachella Valley

enrichment.enrollment_or_capacity_hint: 3,000+ participants annually (org-wide); location-specific capacity not stated
special_programs_if_stated: school PE integration (23,000+ elementary students annually)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Established 23,000-student/year community program with local news coverage and a 12-year city partnership; no structured data on site limits agent discoverability.

enrichment.name: Indio Baseball Softball Organization (IBSO)

enrichment.name: Desert Sluggers Facility
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Site at sluggerstraining.com resolves to a Tennessee facility, not this Indio entity; Desert Sluggers Facility's own web presence is absent or unlisted, leaving visibility reliant on Yelp and social aggregators only.

enrichment.name: Piranha Swim Team – Indio
enrichment.full_address: Indio High School pool, Indio, CA (secondary practice location; street address not confirmed)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Team has operated since 1967 across multiple Coachella Valley cities but primary website returns 403 to bots and surfaces only its own gomotionapp pages in search — no authoritative third-party coverage found for the Indio site specifically.
enrichment._src_name: Piranha Swim Team – Indio practice site

enrichment.name: Gracie Jiu Jitsu Indio
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Surfaces primarily through own-site pages and social platforms (Facebook, Nextdoor); no strong third-party directory or press presence despite operating a multi-program franchise academy with youth, teen, and adult tracks.

enrichment.name: Flow Academy BJJ Indio
enrichment.ages_grades_served: youth all-ages (kids BJJ, Muay Thai, youth crossfit/sports fitness)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Site is JS-rendered and returns minimal content to bots; Yelp and social profiles dominate over the academy's own site in search results.

enrichment.name: Center Stage Dance Company
enrichment.subcategory: arts, music & performing-arts education for youth
enrichment.full_address: 81557 Dr Carreon Blvd Suite B1, Indio, CA 92201
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: 23 seasons of operation with broad multi-style curriculum, but surfaces mainly on own site and social profiles — no local press or directory authority in top results.

enrichment.name: Desert Theatreworks (KidsWorks)
enrichment.subcategory: arts, music & performing-arts education for youth
special_programs_if_stated: After-school theatre partnerships with Desert Sands Unified School District
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Serves 800+ students/year and 15,000 guests annually with a decade of east valley programming, but search surfaces only regional news and BroadwayWorld rather than authoritative education directories.

enrichment.name: Coachella Valley Music Academy
enrichment.subcategory: arts, music & performing-arts education for youth
enrichment.full_address: unknown — no street address displayed; appears to operate as in-home/mobile instruction service in the Coachella Valley
enrichment.ages_grades_served: unknown — site does not specify age range
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Buried behind Academy of Musical Performance (AMP) and Yelp aggregators in top results; CVMA's own site appears only at the bottom of the first-page results for the obvious branded query.

enrichment.name: Academy of Musical Performance (AMP)
enrichment.subcategory: arts, music & performing-arts education for youth
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Operations paused; site and search presence reflect closure but prior community reach (Goldenvoice seed funding, decade of youth programming) is not captured online.

enrichment.name: Ballet Folklorico Sol Del Desierto
enrichment.subcategory: arts, music & performing-arts education for youth
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Group has 36+ years of operation and established community presence (City of Indio events, Tamale Festival) but website is non-functional (404), severely limiting online discoverability.

enrichment.name: CVHC Ballet Folklorico Classes
enrichment.subcategory: arts, music & performing-arts education for youth
enrichment.full_address: Fred Young Labor Camp, Indio, CA
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Multi-site community program serving farmworker families across three Coachella Valley locations with no dedicated social media presence or directory listings beyond the host org site.

enrichment.name: Desert Insight
enrichment.full_address: Indio, CA 92201 (specific street address not displayed on site)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Multi-location therapy practice with bilingual specialization and telehealth; surfaces mainly through own site and SimplePractice portal — thin presence in directories and authoritative third-party sources relative to apparent service footprint across Coachella Valley.

enrichment.name: Family YMCA of the Desert – Doris Mechanick Child Development Center
enrichment.ages_grades_served: preschool / child development (full-day, full-year; state preschool + child development program)
enrichment.enrollment_or_capacity_hint: 60 children (per third-party aggregator; not stated on org site)
special_programs_if_stated: ASES after-school enrichment (sports, drama, yoga, culinary arts, dance, STEM/science club, gardening, guitar, tutoring)
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Main ymcaofthedesert.org returns 403 to bots; the Indio campus (Doris Mechanick) surfaces primarily via third-party aggregators rather than its own indexed pages, despite being a long-established (1996) state-licensed community anchor serving 60 children.

enrichment.name: Boys & Girls Clubs of Coachella Valley — Indio Clubhouse
enrichment.visibility_gap_note: Established 1966 with deep community roots and multiple facilities; online presence is solid but lacks structured data that would improve agent discoverability.
